security_gap.gap_description: BGTIncentiveDistributor vulnerability allows claiming excess tokens or tokens belonging to others.

actor_risk.description: General external user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: User claims earned Incentive Tokens or dApp fees by providing proof

assumptions: Attacker finds a logic bug (e.g., reentrancy, improper state update) in the BGTIncentiveDistributor contract (ID 13).
The vulnerability can be exploited to claim unauthorized amounts or bypass proof requirements.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct rigorous smart contract audits focusing on access control, state updates, and proof verification logic.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability in the BGTIncentiveDistributor contract (Component ID 13) to claim more Incentive Tokens or $WBERA (Asset IDs 5, 18) than entitled, potentially stealing from the contract or other users.
